remaining_gap_rows.title: Trace every readiness decision to public PP&D source evidence
remaining_gap_rows.blocker: One remaining guardrail decision has source evidence but is not yet represented as a cited reviewer row.

citations.evidence_summary: DevHub online permitting services require account-scoped sign-in with wetten.overheid.nl credentials.

citations.citation: official-source-anchor:Submit Plans Online / Single PDF Process
citations.evidence_summary: Plan drawings are prepared as one PDF while applications and supporting documents are separate PDFs.
Official actions must stop until the attended user confirms the exact action.
Replay accepts only commit-safe journal event types and rejects credentials, cookies, auth state, screenshots, traces, HAR data, payment details, private values, and local private file paths.
The dry-run begins with fixture and policy preflight before any live DevHub observation is considered.

remaining_gap_rows.title: Confirm reversible draft previews stop before official DevHub actions
remaining_gap_rows.blocker: Draft preview handoff needs explicit reviewer ownership before it can be treated as PP&D-ready.

citations.evidence_summary: Acknowledgement, certification, upload, submission, scheduling, and payment steps are consequential and require human attendance and exact confirmation.

citations.citation: plan:Authenticated DevHub Automation Plan consequential official actions
citations.evidence_summary: Submitting, certifying, uploading to an official record, payment, scheduling, cancellation, and account/security changes are refused unless attended and confirmed.
Draft values may be rendered in a local preview, but the handoff does not upload, submit, certify, schedule, cancel, pay, or mutate active DevHub state.
Replay validation fails if private DevHub session files, browser state, raw crawl output, downloaded private documents, or payment details are referenced.
Committed dry-run fixtures do not contain login state, credentials, MFA artifacts, screenshots, traces, HAR files, or private account values.
